mapper.select: SELECT * FROM doctor_schedule WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status = 1 AND schedule_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY schedule_date, time_slot

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN doctor d ON ds.doctor_id = d.id WHERE 1=1
AND d.doctor_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{doctorName}, '%')
AND ds.hospital_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{hospitalName}, '%')
AND ds.schedule_date = #{scheduleDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor_schedule (doctor_id, hospital_name, offices_name, schedule_date, time_slot, max_patients, booked_count, status) VALUES (#{doctorId}, #{hospitalName}, #{officesName}, #{scheduleDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{maxPatients}, 0, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor_schedule SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE doctor_schedule SET booked_count = booked_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND booked_count < max_patients
UPDATE doctor_schedule SET booked_count = booked_count - 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND booked_count > 0
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT schedule_date FROM doctor_schedule WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND status = 1 AND booked_count < max_patients AND schedule_date >= CURDATE() ORDER BY schedule_date
SELECT * FROM doctor_schedule WHERE doctor_id = #{doctorId} AND schedule_date = #{scheduleDate} AND status = 1 AND booked_count < max_patients ORDER BY time_slot
